subject: Excited to connect at the conference, Aaron Sweet
body:
Hi Aaron Sweet,

Saw you'll be at the conference and noticed your work at Vantage Capital (Holdings) Ltd. Would love to swap notes on Financial services, technology, Potential Investor, Stage: Seed/Series A.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]


--- CONTEXT FOR LIGHTFERN (remove before sending) ---
Context for Lightfern (delete before sending):
interests: Financial services, technology, Potential Investor, Stage: Seed/Series A
